title: Compliance Spec Frontmatter
description: Validates the YAML frontmatter of specs/compliance.md. ComplianceAgent and the MasterOrchestrator read this at PHASE 0 and Gate 3. The compliance_scope field determines whether full regulatory mapping, minimal documentation, or an explicit opt-out is in effect.

version.description: Semantic version of this spec document (e.g. '1.0.0').

compliance_scope.description: Scope of compliance obligations for this product. FULL = all applicable regulations must be mapped and evidenced. MINIMAL = only OWASP and licence checks required. NONE = explicit opt-out (must be justified in the spec body).

regulations.description: List of regulations or standards applicable to this product (e.g. 'GDPR', 'HIPAA', 'SOC2'). May be empty when compliance_scope is NONE.

validated.description: Whether the frontmatter has been validated by tools/validate-specs.py.

validated_at.description: ISO 8601 datetime of the last successful validation.
